EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An action of a utility of the "{subject.name}" class is detected
An attempt to exploit a vulnerability of the "{subject.name}" class is detected on host {src.host}. Reason: {reason}
A vulnerability of the "{subject.name}" class is detected on host {src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The ICAP server sent an error message. Reason: {reason}
A user action triggered the rule "{subject.name}". Reason: {reason}
The attack "{subject.name}" from host {src.host} is detected
